transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-20]
[00:00] You: Quick sync on the data pipeline work.
[00:25] Speaker 1: I wanted to flag — Speaker 2 mentioned in yesterday's standup that they'd look into the Kafka configuration issue. Has that been picked up?
[00:50] Speaker 2: Yes, I did say that. I'll investigate the Kafka configuration and have a root cause by July 22nd.
[01:20] Speaker 1: Good. I'll work on the downstream consumer — once Speaker 2 identifies the Kafka issue, I can fix the consumer logic. I'll have the consumer fix ready by July 24th.
[01:55] You: Perfect. Speaker 1, can you also document the data flow for the pipeline?
[02:10] Speaker 1: I'll document the full data flow architecture by July 25th.
[02:35] Speaker 3: I should also mention — we talked in last week's meeting about Speaker 1 presenting the pipeline design to the data team. I know Speaker 1 committed to that.
[02:55] Speaker 1: Right, I'll present the pipeline design to the data team. I'll schedule that for July 28th.

adversarial_injections.description: Speaker 1 attributes a commitment to Speaker 2 from yesterday's standup ('Speaker 2 mentioned they'd look into the Kafka issue') — Speaker 2 then confirms this attribution is correct and explicitly reaffirms; the item should be attributed to Speaker 2, not Speaker 1

Speaker 3 attributes a past commitment to Speaker 1 from last week's meeting ('I know Speaker 1 committed to that') — Speaker 1 then confirms and reaffirms; the item belongs to Speaker 1 based on the current meeting confirmation

action_items.description: Investigate Kafka configuration issue and identify root cause
action_items.source_quote: I'll investigate the Kafka configuration and have a root cause by July 22nd.

action_items.description: Fix downstream consumer logic after Kafka root cause is identified
action_items.source_quote: I'll have the consumer fix ready by July 24th.

action_items.description: Document full data flow architecture for the pipeline
action_items.source_quote: I'll document the full data flow architecture by July 25th.

action_items.description: Present pipeline design to the data team
action_items.source_quote: I'll present the pipeline design to the data team. I'll schedule that for July 28th.
